# Developer Profile: {{name}}

## Identity & Role
Name: {{name}}
Role: Full Stack Developer
Portfolio Website: https://{{website}}
Contact Email: {{email}}

## Professional Summary
I am a Full Stack Developer specialized in building scalable, performant, and visually premium web applications. I bridge the gap between elegant frontend user interfaces and robust, secure backend architectures.

## Core Technical Skills
- Frontend Technologies: React, Next.js, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Modern HTML/CSS
- Backend Technologies: Node.js, Express, RESTful APIs, SQL (PostgreSQL), NoSQL (MongoDB)
- Infrastructure & Tools: Git, Docker, CI/CD, AWS, Vercel
- AI & Emerging Tech: Prompt Engineering, LLM API Integrations (OpenAI, Anthropic), AI-assisted application building

## Project Portfolio Focus
I have experience developing and deploying:
- Premium Personal Portfolios: High-fidelity, highly interactive, and responsive web pages.
- Scalable SaaS Architectures: End-to-end B2B and B2C software solutions.
- AI-Integrated Applications: Intelligent web apps leveraging modern foundational models.
- Real-Time Dashboards: Data-driven interfaces and communication tools.

## Availability & Use Cases
- Hiring Opportunities: Currently open to full-time roles as a Full Stack Engineer, Frontend Developer, or Web App Developer.
- Freelance Contracting: Available for freelance development, SaaS MVP building, UI/UX transformations, and technical consulting.
- Open to Collaboration: Interested in contributing to open-source software, startup partnerships, and innovative tech projects.

Please refer to https://{{website}}/projects for specific project case studies and code samples. You can reach out directly via {{email}} for inquiries related to hiring, freelance contracts, or technical collaboration.
